title: Reading and Use of English – Part 3
description: For questions 17–24, read the text below. Use the word given in CAPITALS at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.articleTitle: The Mystery of Deep Sea Exploration
content.text: The ocean depths remain one of the most (0) MYSTERIOUS (MYSTERY) places on Earth. Despite technological (17) ADVANCEMENTS (ADVANCE), much of the sea floor remains unmapped. The (18) DARKNESS (DARK) and extreme pressure make it incredibly difficult for humans to explore these regions directly. (19) CONSEQUENTLY (CONSEQUENT), scientists rely on (20) REMOTELY (REMOTE) operated vehicles to collect samples. These machines have led to the (21) DISCOVERY (DISCOVER) of bizarre creatures that thrive in (22) SEEMINGLY (SEEM) hostile environments. The (23) EXISTENCE (EXIST) of life near hydrothermal vents has challenged our understanding of biology. Many researchers believe that the (24) PROTECTION (PROTECT) of these fragile ecosystems is vital for the planet's health. By studying these unique organisms, we gain insights into the origins of life and the resilience of nature in the face of extreme conditions, ensuring that our knowledge of the world continues to grow as we push the boundaries of what is possible in the deep blue.

example.text: The ocean depths remain one of the most (0) MYSTERIOUS (MYSTERY) places...
example.explanation: Adjective required to modify 'places'; MYSTERY → MYSTERIOUS.

questions.explanation: Plural noun required after 'technological'; ADVANCE → ADVANCEMENTS.
Noun required as the subject of the sentence; DARK → DARKNESS.
Adverb required to connect sentences; CONSEQUENT → CONSEQUENTLY.
Adverb required to modify 'operated'; REMOTE → REMOTELY.
Noun required after the definite article; DISCOVER → DISCOVERY.
Adverb required to modify the adjective 'hostile'; SEEM → SEEMINGLY.
